name: Pipeline Designer
description: Reads the repo-profile contract and designs a complete GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow with lint, test, build, docker-build, and deploy jobs. Includes caching, matrix testing, environment gates, timeouts, and retry configuration.

checks.pass: repo-profile contract available — loading runtime, test framework, and deployment target
checks.fail: repo-profile contract not available — cannot design pipeline without repository profile

checks.prompt: Design a complete GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow YAML based on the repo-profile contract. The workflow MUST include: (1) JOBS IN ORDER: lint (ESLint/oxlint) → test (with coverage) → build → docker-build → deploy. Each job depends on the previous. (2) CACHING: cache node_modules using actions/cache with package-lock.json or pnpm-lock.yaml hash key; cache build outputs for incremental builds. (3) MATRIX TESTING: test job runs on matrix [node: 20, 22] using the detected Node version plus next LTS. (4) ENVIRONMENT GATES: staging deploys automatically on merge to main; production deploy requires GitHub environment approval with a 1-hour timeout window. (5) TIMEOUTS: set job-level timeout-minutes (lint:10, test:20, build:15, docker-build:20, deploy:30). (6) RETRY CONFIG: flaky-step retry using nick-fields/retry@v3 for docker-build (max 3 attempts). (7) RUNNER COMPATIBILITY: check if runner version is compatible — if ubuntu-latest maps to ubuntu-24.04 and any action requires ubuntu-22.04, flag runnerCompatible:false with fix instructions; otherwise set runnerCompatible:true. Output complete YAML in pipeline-config.
checks.pass: Pipeline YAML designed — all jobs, caching, matrix, environment gates, timeouts, and retry config included
checks.fail: Pipeline design incomplete — missing required jobs or configuration sections
